scripts.render: npm run render:15s:en && npm run render:15s:hu && npm run render:30s:en && npm run render:30s:hu
scripts.render:15s:en: remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-15s-16x9-EN out/ceefm-ad-15s-16x9-EN.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p && remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-15s-1x1-EN out/ceefm-ad-15s-1x1-EN.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p && remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-15s-9x16-EN out/ceefm-ad-15s-9x16-EN.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p
scripts.render:15s:hu: remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-15s-16x9-HU out/ceefm-ad-15s-16x9-HU.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p && remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-15s-1x1-HU out/ceefm-ad-15s-1x1-HU.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p && remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-15s-9x16-HU out/ceefm-ad-15s-9x16-HU.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p
scripts.render:30s:en: remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-30s-16x9-EN out/ceefm-ad-30s-16x9-EN.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p && remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-30s-1x1-EN out/ceefm-ad-30s-1x1-EN.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p && remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-30s-9x16-EN out/ceefm-ad-30s-9x16-EN.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p
scripts.render:30s:hu: remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-30s-16x9-HU out/ceefm-ad-30s-16x9-HU.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p && remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-30s-1x1-HU out/ceefm-ad-30s-1x1-HU.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p && remotion render src/index.tsx ceefm-ad-30s-9x16-HU out/ceefm-ad-30s-9x16-HU.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p
